overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a post-apocalyptic landscape during golden hour. The environment features distinctive red blight vegetation, overgrown ancient mechanical structures, and transitions from open fields through bamboo pathways.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with red blight vegetation

events.description: scene transitions from dark opening to bright daylight
character approaches large vine-covered arch structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through red vegetation field toward a large vine-covered arch

entered.detail: large archway covered in yellow vines and hanging vegetation
ground covered in dense red alien vegetation
snow-capped mountain range visible in background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a transition from darkness to a bright golden hour landscape. Aloy walks through an open field dominated by red blight vegetation, approaching a large vine-covered arch structure. The environment is expansive with distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: red blight plains with scattered ancient ruins

events.description: passes under the vine arch into open red field
approaching entrance to elevated bamboo pathway

agents.ego_description: traversing the open red field, passing ancient mechanical structures and towers

entered.detail: entrance to elevated walkway constructed from wooden logs
tall mechanical structure with circular framework top

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the arch, Aloy continues through the expansive red blight field. Ancient mechanical ruins dot the landscape, including a tall tower structure to the left. The ground is cracked earth covered in red vegetation as the character approaches a bamboo pathway entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bamboo walkway with vine arches

events.description: steps onto bamboo log pathway entering covered walkway
passing through series of vine-covered arches with village visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated bamboo pathway through dense greenery and arch structures

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed from wooden logs and planks
thatched roof structures visible through the archway
large green ferns and tropical vegetation lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters an elevated bamboo walkway shaded by vine-covered arches. The environment shifts from red blight to lush green vegetation with large ferns. Through the arches, village structures with thatched roofs become visible in the distance as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field at sunset with mechanical ruins and river

events.description: exiting pathway into bright sunset with strong lens flare
approaching river bank with red vegetation along the water

agents.ego_description: moving toward the sunset across grassy terrain approaching a waterway with mechanical ruins nearby

entered.detail: large circular mechanical structure resembling a satellite dish
calm waterway reflecting the golden sunset light
tall thin mechanical spire rising above the trees

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bamboo pathway, the scene opens into a breathtaking sunset view with strong lens flare. Aloy approaches a river bank lined with red vegetation, while a massive satellite dish ruin stands prominently to the left. The lighting shifts to warm backlit tones as the character moves toward the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a stark, blight-stricken wasteland into a lush sanctuary that culminates in a dramatic sunset vista. It begins as the view emerges from darkness into a bright golden hour landscape, following Aloy through an expansive field of red blight vegetation toward a massive vine-covered arch. As the camera passes under the arch, the scene opens further across cracked earth and ancient mechanical ruins, including a tall tower, before drawing closer to a bamboo pathway entrance. The environment then shifts from red hues to lush greens as the character enters an elevated walkway shaded by vine-covered arches, revealing distant thatched-roof village structures. Finally, the path opens into a breathtaking sunset with strong lens flare, leading the camera past a massive satellite dish ruin toward a river bank bathed in warm, backlit tones.
